title: SD-01: Supported Devices screen — Open/Close/Reopen within 2 seconds (No Headset)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (no headset connected).
From Home screen, tap 'Supported Devices' (or menu → Supported Devices).
Wait for Supported Devices screen to fully render.
Tap Back (or close) to return to Home screen.
Within 2 seconds, tap 'Supported Devices' again.
Observe screen responsiveness and UI state.
expected: Supported Devices screen opens fully and is responsive on second entry. All UI elements (list, search, back button) are tappable. No frozen state, no blank screen, no ANR. Actual (If Bug): Screen becomes unresponsive, touch events are ignored, or screen remains blank/hangs.

title: SD-02: Supported Devices screen — Rapid double-tap entry from Home (No Headset)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (no headset connected).
From Home screen, tap 'Supported Devices' twice in rapid succession (< 1 second between taps).
Observe screen state after the rapid taps.
expected: App does not crash, ANR, or enter a broken state. Either the screen opens once (debounced) or opens and immediately closes/reopens cleanly. No frozen UI, no duplicate stacked fragments. Actual (If Bug): Screen becomes unresponsive due to race condition from rapid re-entry.

title: SD-03: Supported Devices screen — Navigate Home → Supported Devices → Home → Supported Devices (No Headset)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (no headset connected).
Navigate: Home → Supported Devices.
Verify screen renders correctly.
Tap Back → Home screen is displayed.
Navigate: Home → Supported Devices again.
Verify screen renders correctly.
Repeat cycle 3 times total.
expected: Supported Devices screen renders correctly on each entry. Back navigation always returns to Home. No cumulative state corruption, no blank screens, no unresponsive UI after repeated navigation cycles. Actual (If Bug): Screen becomes unresponsive after 1-2 cycles due to navigation state management failure.

title: SD-04: Supported Devices screen — Background + Foreground within 2 seconds (No Headset)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (no headset connected).
Navigate: Home → Supported Devices.
Press Home button to background the app.
Within 2 seconds, tap app icon to bring app to foreground.
Observe Supported Devices screen state.
expected: Supported Devices screen is fully rendered and responsive upon return to foreground. No frozen state, no blank screen, no ANR. All UI elements are interactive. Actual (If Bug): Screen becomes unresponsive after lifecycle transition (onPause → onResume race condition).

title: SD-05: Supported Devices screen — Force-kill app while on screen, reopen immediately (No Headset)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (no headset connected).
Navigate: Home → Supported Devices.
Force-kill the app (swipe from recents).
Within 2 seconds, relaunch the app.
Observe initial screen and navigation state.
expected: App launches cleanly to its normal initial screen (onboarding or Home depending on session restore logic). No crash, no ANR, no frozen state. If session is restored, Supported Devices screen must be fully responsive. Actual (If Bug): App hangs on splash, or Supported Devices screen becomes unresponsive due to incomplete state restoration.

title: SD-06: Supported Devices screen — Rotate device while on screen, then close and reopen within 2 seconds (No Headset)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (no headset connected).
Navigate: Home → Supported Devices.
Rotate device to landscape, then back to portrait.
Tap Back to return to Home.
Within 2 seconds, tap 'Supported Devices' again.
Observe screen responsiveness.
expected: Supported Devices screen opens and is fully responsive after config change (rotation) + rapid re-entry. No frozen state, no layout corruption, no ANR. Actual (If Bug): Screen becomes unresponsive due to combined config change + rapid re-entry race condition.

title: SD-07: Supported Devices screen — Open from multiple entry points rapidly (No Headset)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (no headset connected).
From Home screen, tap 'Supported Devices' → immediately tap Back.
Within 1 second, tap menu/hamburger icon → tap 'Supported Devices' from menu.
Immediately tap Back.
Within 1 second, tap 'Supported Devices' from Home screen again.
Observe screen state after third entry.
expected: Screen opens cleanly on third entry. No frozen state, no blank screen, no ANR. Navigation stack is not corrupted. Actual (If Bug): Screen becomes unresponsive after rapid open/close cycles from different entry points.
